name: io.github.joinQuantish/kalshi
title: Kalshi MCP Server
description: Self-hosted MCP server for Kalshi prediction market trading via DFlow on Solana

environmentVariables.name: DATABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL connection string for market data and user storage

environmentVariables.name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
environmentVariables.description: AES-256 encryption key for securing wallet credentials at rest

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Solana RPC endpoint URL for blockchain interactions
